business_question: How many orders were placed in each store last month?
business_context: Store managers want to compare store performance based on the number of customer orders received during the previous month.
chain_of_thought: Step 1: Filter orders from last month.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    s.store_name,
    COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders
FROM `retail_dw.fact_orders` o
JOIN `retail_dw.dim_store` s
    ON o.store_id = s.store_id
WHERE DATE_TRUNC(o.order_date, MONTH) =
      DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), MONTH)
GROUP BY s.store_name
ORDER BY total_orders DESC;
